observations.archetype_gloss: The dark, repressed aspects of the self manifesting as rage and decay
observations.summary: Aviel exhibits the cold, killing rage of a man whose comfortable lies have been threatened, indicating a confrontation with his own shadow aspects as his internal decay becomes manifest.

evidence.quote: Aviel's face had gone very still, and in that stillness, Dan saw something he'd hoped never to see: the cold, killing rage of a man whose comfortable lies have been threatened.

accepted_observations.summary: Aviel exhibits the cold, killing rage of a man whose comfortable lies have been threatened, indicating a confrontation with his own shadow aspects as his internal decay becomes manifest.
